description_long: This is a weathered yellow plastic bucket with a cylindrical shape and a slightly tapered base. The bucket features a metal wire bail handle attached to reinforced side mounts, with a plastic grip in the center for comfortable carrying. The rim of the bucket is reinforced with two prominent plastic rings, and there are visible streaks and stains, suggesting frequent use and exposure to liquids. The interior is unlined and shows signs of wear, with some discoloration and residue along the upper edge. The exterior surface is matte and slightly rough, with no visible branding or text. This utilitarian bucket is typical of those found in urban environments for cleaning, construction, or maintenance tasks.
description: A weathered yellow plastic bucket with a metal wire bail handle, reinforced rim, and visible stains and wear, typical for urban utility use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the metal wire bail handle with a central plastic grip and visible stains on the rim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the attachment point of the handle and the reinforced plastic rings near the rim.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain cylindrical body, reinforced rim, and absence of the handle in this perspective.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other handle attachment and more surface wear and stains.
